name: ServiceNow, Inc.

profile.description: ServiceNow, Inc. provides cloud-based workflow automation platform for IT service management, HR, security, and customer service. Now AI platform drives enterprise automation. Revenue exceeds $12B annually with 22% growth.

innovation.label: STRONG
innovation.analysis: Track Record (2/3): Now AI platform transformation driving enterprise automation beyond IT. AI Deployment (2/2): Now AI and Now Assist generate measurable productivity gains for enterprise customers. Market Share (2/2): Dominant in IT service management, expanding into enterprise workflow automation. Product Pipeline (1/2): AI agent expansion across verticals. R&D Intensity (1/1): ~20% of revenue on R&D.

inspiration.label: DEVELOPING
inspiration.analysis: Mission Floor (3/4): Making the world work better — validated by consistent platform expansion. Community Impact (1/2): ServiceNow.org impact programs. Employee Retention (0/2): No standout data. Insider Buying (1/2): Management maintains stakes.

infrastructure.label: STRONG
infrastructure.analysis: Mechanically scored. D/E 20.73% excellent (1.0). ROE 16.07% exceeds target (1.0, 2x). Revenue growth 22.1% (1.0). Revenue 5yr CAGR 20% (1.0, 2x). Forward P/E 22.37 (0.94). Profit margin 12.59% (0.63). Very strong metrics.

ai_resilience.label: MODERATE
ai_resilience.analysis: AI Risk Protection (5/9): Enterprise software faces AI disruption — AI agents could automate workflows ServiceNow enables. However, deep enterprise integration and switching costs protect. AI Opportunity (1/1): Now AI platform generating measurable revenue.

infinite_game.summary: ServiceNow demonstrates genuine infinite game thinking through consistent platform expansion and courageous AI investment.

just_cause.analysis: Just Cause (2/3): "Making the world work better" — validated by 20+ years of platform expansion.

trusting_teams.analysis: Trusting Teams (1/2): Stable leadership and growing workforce.

worthy_rivals.analysis: Worthy Rivals (1/1): Uses Salesforce and Microsoft as benchmarks.

existential_flexibility.analysis: Existential Flexibility (1/2): Expanded from IT helpdesk to enterprise-wide workflow platform.

courage_to_lead.analysis: Courage to Lead (2/2): Heavy AI investment and platform expansion beyond IT comfort zone.

investment_thesis: ServiceNow delivers 22% revenue growth with 16% ROE and only 20.7% D/E. Now AI platform positions it to capture enterprise AI automation spending. $116B market cap is justified by $12B+ revenue growing above 20%.
thesis_continued: Forward P/E of 22.37 and trailing P/E of 66.93 leave limited margin of safety. Profit margin of 12.59% is below SaaS peers. AI could disrupt enterprise workflow automation if agents bypass ServiceNow's platform.
key_catalysts: Now AI platform driving net-new enterprise AI spending
Revenue growth above 20% with margin expansion
Platform expansion into new verticals (HR, security, customer service)
key_risks: AI workflow agents from Microsoft, Salesforce could bypass ServiceNow platform
Forward P/E of 22x at 22% growth leaves limited margin of safety
Profit margin of 12.59% below SaaS expectations suggests pricing or cost challenges
sources: ServiceNow Q1 2026 Earnings — SEC Filings, Yahoo Finance, 2026
